text:
if defined?(::ActiveRecord) && object.is_a?(ActiveRecord::Base) ||
            defined?(::Mongoid) && object.class.include?(Mongoid::Document)
          auto_link object
        elsif defined?(::ActiveRecord) && object.is_a?(ActiveRecord::Relation)
          format_collection(object)
        else
          display_name object
        end

module Rails
    autoload :Helpers, "doorkeeper/rails/helpers"
    autoload :Routes, "doorkeeper/rails/routes"
  end

if model_class.respond_to?(:supports_expiration_time_math?) && model_class.supports_expiration_time_math?
            scope = scope.where("#{model_class.expiration_time_sql} < ?", Time.current)
          else
            ::Kernel.warn(::Doorkeeper::Models::ExpirationTimeSqlMath::WARNING_MESSAGE)
          end

if defined?(ActionDispatch::ContentSecurityPolicy::Middleware) && Rails.application.config.content_security_policy && !app.config.api_only
          app.middleware.insert_before ActionDispatch::ContentSecurityPolicy::Middleware, Bullet::Rack
        else
          app.middleware.use Bullet::Rack
        end

if Bullet.start?
            records.compact!
            if records.first.class.name !~ /^HABTM_/
              records.each { |record| Bullet::Detector::Association.add_object_associations(record, association) }
              Bullet::Detector::UnusedEagerLoading.add_eager_loadings(records, association)
            end
          end

if Bullet.start?
            if @owner.class.name !~ /^HABTM_/
              Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.call_association(@owner, @reflection.name, inversed: @inversed)
              Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.add_possible_objects(result) unless @inversed
            end
          end

unless @inversed
                if Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.impossible?(@owner)
                  Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.add_impossible_object(result) if result
                else
                  Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.add_possible_objects(result) if result
                end
              end

if Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.impossible?(owner)
                    Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.add_impossible_object(result) if result
                  else
                    Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.add_possible_objects(result) if result
                  end

unless association.embedded?
            Bullet::Detector::NPlusOneQuery.call_association(self, name)
          end

if html5?
          input_html_options[:type] ||= "range"
          input_html_options[:step] ||= 1
        end

if new_env["HTTPS"]
        new_env["rack.url_scheme"] = new_env["HTTPS"] == "on" ? "https" : "http"
      end

unless MIME_REGEXP.match?(string)
        raise InvalidMimeType, "#{string.inspect} is not a valid MIME type"
      end

unless after[2] == "[" && after.end_with?("]") && (child_key = after[3, after.length - 4]) && !child_key.empty? && !child_key.index("[") && !child_key.index("]")
            # Handle other nested array parameters
            child_key = after[2, after.length]
          end

if separator
          COMMON_SEP[separator] || /[#{separator}] */n
        else
          DEFAULT_SEP
        end

if anchor
              path << "##{Journey::Router::Utils.escape_fragment(anchor.to_param)}"
            end

if uri.relative? || uri.scheme == "http" || uri.scheme == "https"
          body = ""
        else
          return [400, { Rack::CONTENT_TYPE => "text/plain; charset=utf-8" }, ["Invalid redirection URI"]]
        end

if !(/\.[^.]{2,3}\.[^.]{2}\z/.match?(request.host))
                cookie_domain = dot_splitted_host.last(2).join(".")
              # **.**, ***.** style TLDs like co.uk and com.au
              else
                cookie_domain = dot_splitted_host.last(3).join(".")
              end

if session.loaded? && session.key?("flash") && session["flash"].nil?
          session.delete("flash")
        end

if only_path
            "/" + url.partition(%r{(?<!/)/(?!/)}).last
          else
            url
          end

if join.is_a?(Arel::Nodes::StringJoin)
              join_string = Arel::Nodes::And.new(constraints.unshift join.left)
              join.left = join_string
            else
              right = join.right
              right.expr = Arel::Nodes::And.new(constraints.unshift right.expr)
            end

if result && type == :time
                result = result.change(year: 2000, month: 1, day: 1)
              end

if no_op_column
              sql << " ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE #{no_op_column}=#{no_op_column}"
            end

if uuid.match?(CANONICAL_UUID)
                uuid
              else
                uuid = uuid.delete("{}-").downcase
                "#{uuid[..7]}-#{uuid[8..11]}-#{uuid[12..15]}-#{uuid[16..19]}-#{uuid[20..]}"
              end

if pg_config[:variables]
            ENV["PGOPTIONS"] = pg_config[:variables].filter_map do |name, value|
              "-c #{name}=#{value.to_s.gsub(/[ \\]/, '\\\\\0')}" unless value == ":default" || value == :default
            end.join(" ")
          end

if value.match?(/\A\w+\(.*\)\z/)
              "(#{value})"
            else
              value
            end
